title: TRANSFORMATIVE SHELTER - 211info
text: COMMUNITY OUTREACH INC TRANSFORMATIVE SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transitional housing. Residents will be offered access to case management services, medical and dental treatment, access to food pantry, as well as courses on life, career, computer, health, cooking, nutrition, communication, and overcoming barriers to acquiring permanent housing. Residents may also have access to domestic violence support, substance abuse and mental health counseling, and household and hygiene supplies. 865 NW Reiman Avenue Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Adult individuals age 18 or older or families with children under age 18 Must agree to be clean and sober for the duration of stay. Must not have a registered sex offense. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 758-3000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 758-3000 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Form of ID and proof of health insurance if available, not required. AREA SERVED: Benton, Lincoln, and Linn Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Bus stop about 900 feet from the shelter/clinic. Take 9th Street to NW Reiman Avenue. The shelter/clinic is at the end of NW Reiman Avenue. Services: Recovery Homes/Halfway Houses Transitional Housing/Shelter Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - EMERGENCY FOOD HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - DENTAL CLINIC HOUSING/SHELTER - GOOD2GO VETERAN PROGRAM OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - MEDICAL CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMMUNITY OUTREACH INC
